==English Content== {{Portal|Arithmetic}} {{Commons cat|Arithmetic}}
[[Arithmetic]] is a branch of (or the forerunner of) [[mathematics]] which records elementary properties of certain operations on [[number]]s.

[[Arithmetic]] is a branch of (or the forerunner of) [[mathematics]] which records elementary properties of certain operations on [[number]]s.

[[Arithmetic]] is a branch of (or the forerunner of) [[mathematics]] which records elementary properties of certain operations on [[number]]s.

==English Content== {{Portal|Arithmetic}} {{Commons cat|Arithmetic}}

==English Content== {{Portal|Arithmetic}} {{Commons cat|Arithmetic}}
[[Arithmetic]] is a branch of (or the forerunner of) [[mathematics]] which records elementary properties of certain operations on [[number]]s.
